item.itemalchemy.tome_of_knowledge.desc: §7A mystical book containing knowledge of all items

block.itemalchemy.emc_collector_mk1.desc: §9Generation: Slow|||§9Requires: Direct sunlight|||§fPlace in sunlight to generate EMC|||Outputs to adjacent machines

block.itemalchemy.emc_collector_mk3.desc: §9Generation: Fast|||§9Requires: Partial shade OK|||§fRequired for mid-tier operations
block.itemalchemy.emc_collector_mk4.desc: §9Generation: Very Fast|||§9Requires: Minimal light|||§fCan power multiple machines
block.itemalchemy.emc_collector_mk5.desc: §9Generation: Maximum|||§9Requires: Works in darkness|||§fSingle collector can power|||entire alchemical base
